title: f/prompts.chat
summary: prompts.chat（原名 Awesome ChatGPT Prompts）是一个开源的提示词（prompt）分享与发现平台，允许用户从社区中收集、分享和发现各类 AI 提示词。项目基于 Next.js 和 TypeScript 构建，支持自托管部署，保障隐私安全。涵盖 ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini 等主流 LLM 的提示词，拥有超过 16 万 Star，是 prompt engineering 领域的重要资源库。
summary_en: prompts.chat (formerly Awesome ChatGPT Prompts) is an open-source platform for sharing, discovering, and collecting AI prompts from the community. Built with Next.js and TypeScript, it supports self-hosting for complete privacy. It covers prompts for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and other major LLMs, with over 166k stars, making it a key resource in prompt engineering.
